news.title: Annual Day 2026 Highlights
news.description: A memorable evening of performances and celebrations.
news.details: The Annual Day 2026 was a grand success with dance, music and drama. Chief Guest praised our focus on holistic development. Over 450 students participated.

news.title: Science Exhibition Winners
news.description: Our students shine at the inter-school science exhibition.

news.title: New Smart Classrooms Inaugurated
news.description: Digital boards and tech-aided learning now in all sections.
news.details: The school has upgraded all classrooms with smart boards and high-speed connectivity. Teachers have been trained to use the new tools effectively.

news.title: Sports Day 2026
news.description: Annual sports meet saw record participation.

news.title: Parent-Teacher Meet
news.description: Successful PTM held for all classes.

news.title: Library Week Celebration
news.description: Book readings, quizzes and author talks during Library Week.
news.details: Students participated in reading challenges and met a local author. The library has added 500 new titles this year.

events.title: Annual Day Celebration 2026
events.details: Annual Day 2026 brought together students, parents and dignitaries for an evening of culture, talent and recognition. Theme: Roots and Wings. Chief Guest addressed the gathering and distributed awards.

events.title: Science Fair 2026
events.details: Inter-school science exhibition with working models and experiments. Our students won prizes in Physics, Chemistry and Biology categories.

events.title: Sports Meet 2026
events.details: Annual sports day with track and field events, team games and march past. Medals and trophies for winners. Emphasis on participation and sportsmanship.
